speaker: Hillary R. Clinton
text: Vance's redefinition of American identity as 'a particular people' rooted in generations of residence — rather than as a creed — contradicts the founders' philosophy and is a politically dangerous device that should be rejected wholesale.
context: Responding to the Polish MFA's question quoting Vance. [word uncertain in source]

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
